originalTitle: Wall St falls as tech earnings spark AI spending worries
summary: STORY: Wall Street stocks plummeted on Thursday, with the Dow dropping about 1%, the S&P 500 shedding 1.2% and the Nasdaq tumbling more than 2%. The latest earnings results from large tech companies such as Alphabet and Tesla revived concerns about heavy AI spending, says Keith Buchanan, senior portfolio manager for Globalt Investments. "We're at a point now where the hype has to kind of meet some level of realistic expectation, quantifiable expectation. And the markets are starting to digest just what this means to cash flow in some of the largest companies in the world going forward. And a lot of spending is eating into cash flow in a way that's making investors lose a bit of comfort and question a lot of valuations that have grown over the past couple of years. And that's what's really at the root of what's really hampering some of the market returns today and giving back some of the gains that we've gotten for the market over the past couple of weeks." Shares of Alphabet sank 7% after the tech giant reported higher spending plans while it also burned cash. And shares of Tesla tumbled 14.5% after Elon Musk's EV maker reported negative free cash flow in the second quarter for the first time in more than two years. But shares of Intel rose 10% in extended trading after the company forecast quarterly profit and revenue above Wall Street estimates as an AI data center buildout increases demand for its central processing units, or CPUs. Meanwhile, Brent crude oil futures settled above $100 a barrel for the first time since May, and U.S. oil futures settled above $92. The surge in oil prices prompted worries about inflation ahead of next week's Federal Reserve policy meeting.

chineseTitle: 科技财报引发 AI 支出担忧，华尔街下跌
chineseSummary: 故事：华尔街股市周四暴跌，道琼斯指数下跌约 1%，标准普尔 500 指数下跌 1.2%，纳斯达克指数下跌超过 2%。 Globalt Investments 高级投资组合经理基思·布坎南 (Keith Buchanan) 表示，Alphabet 和特斯拉等大型科技公司的最新财报再次引发了人们对人工智能巨额支出的担忧。 “我们现在正处于这样一个阶段，炒作必须满足一定程度的现实预期、可量化的预期。市场开始消化这对世界上一些最大的公司未来的现金流意味着什么。大量支出正在蚕食现金流，这让投资者失去了一点安慰，并对过去几年增长的估值提出质疑。这才是真正阻碍一些公司发展的根本原因。”今天的市场回报，并回馈了过去几周我们为市场带来的一些收益。”科技巨头 Alphabet 公布了更高的支出计划，同时还烧钱，该公司股价下跌 7%。在埃隆·马斯克(Elon Musk)的电动汽车制造商报告第二季度自由现金流两年多以来首次出现负值后，特斯拉股价暴跌14.5%。但由于人工智能数据中心的扩建增加了对其中央处理器（CPU）的需求，英特尔预测季度利润和收入高于华尔街的预期，该公司股价在盘后交易中上涨了 10%。与此同时，布伦特原油期货自5月份以来首次收于每桶100美元以上，美国石油期货收于每桶92美元以上。油价飙升引发了下周美联储政策会议前对通胀的担忧。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
